title: Coderturtle.io
tagline: The site you're standing on, built in public.
summary: Coderturtle.io is the practical, hands-on counterpart to Agentic Tekton's architecture voice: a static Astro + Tailwind site, rebuilt project by project instead of post by post. This project's build log is the honest record of building it — including the parts that were AI-assisted, the parts that weren't, and the parts that had to be redone.

log.title: Cogs, tilt, and a terminal that talks back to agents
log.summary: The ecosystem got its own page shaped like actual gears, the workshop floor stopped being flat, and the site learned to describe itself in a format agents can parse instead of just humans.

log.title: The dark reset: rejecting the schematic pass
log.summary: The retro-futurist blueprint pass got rejected outright: too subtle, wrong kind of futuristic, missed the point. Here's the honest log of the reset that followed.

log.title: Vibing with ChatGPT
log.summary: From concept to turtle-powered Astro site: an impatient engineer, a chatty AI, and the art of vibe-coding.
